name: campaignStatus
label: SMS Campaign Status Updated
description: Triggers when a campaign SMS receives a delivery status update (DLR). Copy the webhook URL provided by Make and paste it in the "Webhook URL (DLR)" field of the "Send SMS Campaign" module.

webhook.help: Copy this webhook URL and paste it in the "Webhook URL (DLR)" field when sending an SMS campaign. The SMS en Masse API will POST delivery updates to this URL.
